10th_Pass.Job Description: Peon, daftary, jamadar, farash, chowkidar, safaiwala, mali, junior operator etc. in various Central Government Ministries/Departments/Offices.
10th_Pass.Career Growth: Promotions through departmental exams to LDC and UDC.

10th_Pass.Eligibility: 10th pass with 50% marks + ITI in relevant trade
10th_Pass.Job Description: Training in various trades like Fitter, Welder, Machinist, Electrician under the Apprentices Act.
10th_Pass.Career Growth: Provides preference in Group D railway recruitment.

Intermediate_12th.Job Title: Lower Division Clerk (LDC) / Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA)
Required Skills: Typing (35 wpm in English / 30 wpm in Hindi)
Intermediate_12th.Job Description: Handling clerical tasks, typing work, maintaining files, registers, and basic administration in government ministries.
Intermediate_12th.Career Growth: Promotion to Upper Division Clerk (UDC) and Section Officer.

Intermediate_12th.Job Description: Handling customer queries via phone, email, or chat. Resolving complaints and providing product information.
Intermediate_12th.Career Growth: Team Lead, Quality Analyst, Operations Manager.
Intermediate_12th.Selection Process: Aptitude Test, Voice Versant Test, HR Interview

Diploma_ITI.Job Description: Supervising construction, electrical maintenance, estimating budgets, and quality control at government project sites.
Operating machinery, assembling parts, maintaining technical equipment, and assisting senior engineers.

BTech_Engineering.Eligibility: B.Tech/BE in CSE, ECE, IT or related fields with >60% aggregate
BTech_Engineering.Job Description: Developing software applications, writing optimized code, testing, and collaborating with cross-functional agile teams.
BTech_Engineering.Career Growth: Senior Software Engineer -> Tech Lead -> Architect.
BTech_Engineering.Selection Process: Aptitude Test, Coding Round, Technical Interview, HR Interview

BTech_Engineering.Eligibility: B.Tech/BE in CS/IT with strong programming skills
BTech_Engineering.Job Description: Designing scalable architectures, writing high-performance backend APIs, and building complex user interfaces.
BTech_Engineering.Selection Process: Online Assessment (DSA), 3-4 Technical Rounds, System Design, HR

Degree_BSc_BCom_BBA_BA.Eligibility: Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University
Degree_BSc_BCom_BBA_BA.Job Description: General banking administration, handling customer complaints, processing loans, and branch management.
Degree_BSc_BCom_BBA_BA.Career Growth: Assistant Manager -> Branch Manager -> Assistant General Manager.

Degree_BSc_BCom_BBA_BA.Job Description: Pitching educational courses to prospective students, closing sales deals, meeting revenue targets.
Degree_BSc_BCom_BBA_BA.Selection Process: Group Discussion, Mock Pitch, HR Interview

MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Eligibility: M.Tech / MCA / Master's in Data Science or Statistics
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Job Description: Analyzing large datasets, building predictive ML models, and providing actionable business insights to stakeholders.
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Career Growth: Senior Data Scientist -> Lead Data Scientist -> Head of Analytics.
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Selection Process: Coding Test, Data Modeling Case Study, Technical Interview, HR
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Required Certifications: AWS Machine Learning / Azure Data Scientist (Preferred)

MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Eligibility: MBA from a premier institute (IIMs, ISB, XLRI)
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Job Description: Advising corporate executives on strategy, operations, M&A, and digital transformations to improve business performance.
MTech_MBA_MCA_HigherEducation.Selection Process: Resume Shortlist, Case Interviews (Multiple Rounds), Partner Fit Interview

Freelancing_Startups.Eligibility: Portfolio demonstrating strong skills, degrees don't matter heavily.
Freelancing_Startups.Average Salary: Variable (₹20,000 - ₹2,00,000+ per month based on clients)
Freelancing_Startups.Job Description: Bidding on international tech projects, developing websites, designing user interfaces, and delivering direct to clients.
Freelancing_Startups.Career Growth: Top Rated Freelancer -> Running an agency.
